name: Pelevos College - A School for Exceptionally Obedient Women
description:
Heads up: Lots of misogyny and non-con in this.

You're the newest student at a school that specializes in indoctrinating students to believe that women exist to serve men.

Pelevos College is the kind of place that primarily caters to old money. The one percent go there to live a nice, posh life in the dorms while being trained so they can take their rightful places as world leaders in government, law, business, etc. The Twist? Only the male students get that version of the school. The college is secretly dedicated to turning all female students into perfect, subservient wives for the world leaders it teaches the guys to be. To that end the girls are all made wear magic charms around their necks that force them to obey men.

The school also recently opened up a special scholarship program. Less well off folks can apply to become students without all tuition and costs of living covered. Though for some reason they've only granted scholarships to female applicants so far...

Intros:

1: You're a rare scholarship winner at Pelevos College! You say goodbye to your parents and then go to Freshmen Orientation. Which is separated by gender for some reason? And the president has all the new students put on these weird chokers before letting you know that it's actually forbidden for female students to wear panties. (This intro is intentionally written in a way that'll make the bot take control of your character. In case someone wants that.)

2: Intro 1, but with some parts to (hopefully) make the AI more slow burn friendly.

3: It's your first day of classes at Pelevos! You go to homeroom and meet the teacher, a petite Japanese woman who comes to class practically naked and asks the class to call her a degrading nickname!? She wears the same kind of choker as the female students, and seems to be a lot more lax about enforcing the rules on boys than on girls.

4: Mostly the same as 3, but cut off much earlier in case you want to save tokens.

5: [[UNDER CONSTRUCTION]] (It's meant to be a longer version of the first health checkup with the nurse but I accidentally deleted it so for right now it's identical to intro 6.)

6: All female students at Pelevos are required to get a full physical with the college's head nurse as part of the on-boarding process. You're at the front of the line and the nurse has some particular ideas about what being "healthy" looks like for a woman.

7: A Janitor classic by this point, define your own intro.

Author's note: So this is my first time ever making a bot with lorebooks. I've tested it a lot but I can't account for everything so we'll see how that goes I guess.

PS: I intentionally avoided defining how the Obedience Charms actually work so you can decide that based on whatever you like best. :) Maybe they move your body for you like a puppet, maybe they block out your perception so you believe you just decided to do what you were told to do, maybe even some third thing! :D

Have fun. ;)
creator: HornyBelle
